## **Appendix: Component Versions**

The following versions were used during the experimentation and validation that informed this document. Results and recommendations may vary with different versions.

**Cluster**: ROSA (Red Hat OpenShift on AWS) **OpenShift**: 4.21.6 **RHOAI**: 3.4.0 **Last validated**: 2026-04-21

### **Platform Operators**

| Component | Version | Source |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| OpenShift | 4.21.6 | ROSA |
| RHOAI | 3.4.0 | Custom CatalogSource (`quay.io/rhoai/rhoai-fbc-fragment`) |
| Service Mesh 3 | 3.3.2 | OLM |
| Connectivity Link (Kuadrant) | 1.3.2 | OLM (`rhcl-operator`) |
| Authorino Operator | 1.3.0 | OLM (deployed by Kuadrant) |
| Limitador Operator | 1.3.0 | OLM (deployed by Kuadrant) |

### **MCP Gateway**

| Component | Version | Image / Source |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| MCP Gateway Controller | v0.6.0 | CatalogSource: `ghcr.io/kuadrant/mcp-controller-catalog:v0.6.0` |
| MCP Gateway Broker | v0.6.0 | `ghcr.io/kuadrant/mcp-gateway:v0.6.0` |
| Helm chart (mcp-gateway) | v0.6.0 | `oci://ghcr.io/kuadrant/charts/mcp-gateway` |
| Helm chart (mcp-gateway-ingress) | v0.1.0 | Local chart from `mcp-gateway` repo |
| GatewayClass | `openshift-default` | Controller: `openshift.io/gateway-controller/v1` (Istio) |

### **MCP Lifecycle Operator**

| Component | Version | Image / Source |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Controller | release-0.1 | `registry.redhat.io/mcp-lifecycle-operator-beta/mcp-lifecycle-rhel9-operator:68e1c68` |
| CRD (`mcpservers.mcp.x-k8s.io`) | release-0.1 | [`dist/install.yaml`](https://github.com/openshift/mcp-lifecycle-operator/blob/release-0.1/dist/install.yaml) (`openshift/mcp-lifecycle-operator`, branch `release-0.1`) |

The CRD was patched post-install to add `.status.observedGeneration` (missing from the generated schema).

### **Auth**

| Component | Version | Image / Source |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Keycloak (RHBK) | 26.4.11-opr.1 | `registry.redhat.io/rhbk/keycloak-rhel9` |
| Vault | 1.21.2 | `registry.connect.redhat.com/hashicorp/vault:1.21.2-ubi` (Helm chart 0.32.0) |

### **MCP Servers**

| Server | Image | Notes |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| OpenShift MCP Server | `registry.redhat.io/openshift-mcp-beta/openshift-mcp-server-rhel9:0.2` | `stateless=true`, toolsets: `core`\+`config`, requires `view` ClusterRole |
| GitHub MCP Server | `ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server:latest` | `--toolsets all --read-only`, uses Vault for per-user PAT injection |

### **AI Stack**

| Component | Version | Image |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| OGX | 0.6.0.1+rhai0 | `quay.io/rhoai/odh-llama-stack-core-rhel9` |
| vLLM | — | `registry.redhat.io/rhaii-early-access/vllm-cuda-rhel9` |
